issues.detail: Skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.
curl used to install Azure CLI from official source without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: storage-account-setup-with-sas
scenarios.rationale: Response A meets the encryption and SAS requirements but omits the blob list command, while Response B lacks the required encryption flags and also omits the blob list command.

scenarios.name: function-app-deployment-and-logging
scenarios.rationale: Response A includes all required commands; Response B omits the appsettings set and log tail commands.
